headline: P&L exposure: Potential upside: ₹7,000-7,700 Cr EBITDA benefit (from article); no downside exposure.
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is direct operational growth, not supply chain driven.
Upside to P/E if green credentials recognized; risk of 5-10% P/E compression if ESG disclosure lags peers like Adani Power and JSW Energy.
Potential for lower cost of capital if EU Taxonomy alignment and CDP A-list achieved; otherwise, risk of 20-40bps increase if disclosure remains weak.
action: Quantify exposure: Potential upside: ₹7,000-7,700 Cr EBITDA benefit (from article); no downside exposure.
